name: perplexity-unified
description: Unified Perplexity clone for single-service deployment

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npx shx rm -rf backend/public && npx shx cp -r frontend/dist backend/public
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
